subject: [PATCH v7 08/15] mm: handle VM_UFFD_RWP in khugepaged, rmap, and GUP

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch extends three mm paths outside the fault handler gate to handle VM_UFFD_RWP (User Faultd Read-Write Protected) in the same way as VM_UFFD_WP (User Faultd Write Protected). The affected paths are khugepaged, rmap, and GUP. In khugepaged, ranges with the uffd PTE bit are protected from collapse or retraction. In rmap, batching is capped at 1 for VM_UFFD_RWP to ensure each PTE can be handled individually. In GUP, a fault is forced on VMAs with VM_UFFD_RWP regardless of FOLL_HONOR_NUMA_FAULT. This ensures that RWP uses protnone as an access-tracking marker and not for NUMA hinting.
